title: The Number of Full Rounds You Have Played

testcases.input: loginTime = "09:31", logoutTime = "10:14" Output: 1 Explanation: You played one full round from 09:45 to 10:00. You did not play the full round from 09:30 to 09:45 because you logged in at 09:31 after it began. You did not play the full round from 10:00 to 10:15 because you logged out at 10:14 before it ended.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: You played one full round from 09:45 to 10:00. You did not play the full round from 09:30 to 09:45 because you logged in at 09:31 after it began. You did not play the full round from 10:00 to 10:15 because you logged out at 10:14 before it ended.

testcases.input: loginTime = "21:30", logoutTime = "03:00" Output: 22 Explanation: You played 10 full rounds from 21:30 to 00:00 and 12 full rounds from 00:00 to 03:00. 10 + 12 = 22.
testcases.expectedOutput: 22 Explanation: You played 10 full rounds from 21:30 to 00:00 and 12 full rounds from 00:00 to 03:00. 10 + 12 = 22.
